title: Ruins & Runes
description: This Mod Add's a Vanilla Styled Magic System involving runes, ancient ruins, custom weapons with new abilities and more.
body:
Some things this mods incude is new structures which randomly generate in plains, forests and birch forests, these new structures gift the play access to the new runes, and their block counter parts which apply effects to the player when stood on, these blocks can make a great addition to your base and and great decoration, which work perfectly with the new tuff varients, including tuff bricks, pillars, polished tuff and there slab and stair counter parts.

![Ruin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/949ee8a20dd530afade46190c29484b38970a642.jpeg)



I doesn't end at that! Custom Weapons can be crafted with these new runes, Such as Hades' Sythe and The Enhanced Sythe.

![Sythe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d038379ea8690567ae40ef0120baead4353fa66c.jpeg)

Alongside The New Runes, is the Sculk Screamer, Enhanced Sculk Screamer and Scream in a Jar, New Mobility items which launch you into the air with haste.
